eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 05:01 PM ON APR 22, 2026 Effective until 01:01 AM APR 23, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Mesa Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Mesa Police Department is looking for a black female, Aurelia Thibodeau, 17 years-old, 5 foot 10 inches, 146 pounds, brown hair, green eyes. Aurelia was last seen wearing a grey tank top, navy blue sweatpants, and a grey sweatshirt. She has a medical condition that can cause her to become easily confused. She left on foot from the area of Adobe Street and Dixon Street in Mesa, Arizona. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
